meaning: adj.富裕的,丰富的,丰饶的,繁茂的
examples: Heavy silverplate adds an opulent touch to a formal dinner party.
The duke built an opulent palace for himself nearby.
We took a look into the opulent life of this incredible entrepreneur.
Erected in 1928, its interiors are opulent, with heavy silk curtains, porcelain antiques and dark-wood furniture.
Dreier led an opulent, jet-setting life by most reports, with several homes and a 120-foot yacht.
